other_observers: Many; Snook Cippoletti first photographed and reported the bird 27 December and again 9 Jan 2010.
specific_location: Near intersection of HWY 24 & Scott Road (38.9893 N, 104.5248 W)
description: Nearly all-white, large owl. No ear tufts, black bill, yellow eyes. Feathered feet. Light brownish-gray spotting on upper wing surfaces, a speck or two of black on head and body (precluding full adult male?) Very light gray tipping on most body feathers.Behaviors: Mostly sleeping on ground or on fence post. At 16:30 began hunting from perches such as a TV antenna and roof tops. One unsuccessful plunge to the ground was witnessed a little after 17:00.Call: not heardPlumage: sub-adult
photographer: Photographer: Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker, Bill Schmoker
